title: cirsium × fraserianum
intro: Cirsium × fraserianum, also known as the Fraser's thistle, is a hybrid species of thistle that is native to North America. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cirsium × fraserianum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting digestive health, as well as its use as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Cirsium × fraserianum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
